title: Acinodendron rigens
intro:

Strychnos rigens is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae, commonly known as the strychnine tree. The most common herbal preparations made with Strychnos rigens include extracts and infusions, which may be used to treat various health conditions, although its use is often discouraged due to the toxicity of its alkaloid constituents.
